# BDExam Website
https://bdexam.pages.dev

## Description
Free Bangladesh exam & education calculator website.

## Features
- GPA Calculator (SSC/HSC)
- Age Calculator
- Marks Calculator
- Salary Calculator
- Education tools for students

## Target Users
Bangladesh students (SSC, HSC, University)

## Purpose
To help students calculate results easily and improve education planning.

## Pages
- Home: https://bdexam.pages.dev/
- Age Calculator: https://bdexam.pages.dev/age-calculator.html
- GPA Calculator: https://bdexam.pages.dev/gpa-calculator.html
- Marks Calculator: https://bdexam.pages.dev/marks-calculator.html
- Salary Calculator: https://bdexam.pages.dev/salary-calculator.html
- Contact: https://bdexam.pages.dev/contact.html

## Language
English + Bangla audience

## Category
Education, Tools, Calculators
